results.title: OpenClaw
results.description: OpenClaw is a multi-platform AI agent gateway that bridges WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and iMessage to coding agents with support for streaming, multi-agent routing, and media handling.

results.title: OpenClaw
results.description: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant that runs on your own devices and integrates with multiple messaging platforms including WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, and others, with voice capabilities and a live canvas interface.

results.title: OpenClaw
results.description: OpenClaw is an AI gateway system that provides authentication monitoring and a built-in scheduler for automating tasks and managing agent interactions.

results.title: Awesome OpenClaw Skills
results.description: A curated collection of 700+ community-built OpenClaw skills organized by category, enabling users to extend their locally-running AI assistant with specialized capabilities and integrations.

results.title: OpenCLIP
results.description: OpenCLIP is an open-source implementation of OpenAI's CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) model, used for training various language-image models on diverse datasets.

results.title: OpenCAD Library
results.description: An open-source C/C++ library under X11/MIT license for everyday use, currently supporting DWG R2000 format.

results.title: OpenCV
results.description: Open Source Computer Vision Library

results.title: The OpenGL Extension Wrangler Library
results.description: The OpenGL Extension Wrangler Library (GLEW) is a cross-platform C/C++ library for loading OpenGL extensions, providing efficient run-time mechanisms to determine supported extensions and exposing core and extension functionality in a single header file.

results.title: OpenCV
results.description: OpenCV is an open-source computer vision and machine learning software library that provides a common infrastructure for computer vision applications.

results.title: OpenCV
results.description: OpenCV is an open-source computer vision library providing tools and modules for image processing, video analysis, object detection, and machine learning applications.

results.title: OpenCL-Wrapper
results.description: A lightweight C++ wrapper for OpenCL that simplifies development, maintains functionality, and preserves performance, compatible with Windows, Linux, and Android.

results.title: Ocl
results.description: Pure OpenCL bindings and interfaces for Rust, providing a simple, intuitive, and performant way to leverage OpenCL devices.

results.title: OpenRGB
results.description: OpenRGB is a single, open-source application designed to unify control of various RGB hardware devices across Windows, Linux, and macOS, eliminating the need for multiple proprietary manufacturer apps.

results.title: OpenSkills
results.description: OpenSkills is a CLI tool that replicates Anthropic's Claude Code skills system, enabling universal access to skill management, installation, and invocation for various AI coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and Aider.

results.title: OpenMW
results.description: OpenMW is an open-source open-world RPG game engine that supports playing Morrowind and includes OpenMW-CS, a replacement for Bethesda's Construction Set.

results.title: OpenCvSharp
results.description: OpenCvSharp is a .NET wrapper for the OpenCV image processing library, providing managed libraries and native bindings for various platforms.

results.title: openFrameworks
results.description: openFrameworks is a C++ toolkit designed for creative coding, providing tools for artists, designers, and programmers.

results.title: openFrameworks
results.description: openFrameworks is an open-source C++ toolkit for creative coding, offering a comprehensive API reference for its core functionalities, including 3D graphics and application management.

results.title: OpenFeature CLI
results.description: The OpenFeature CLI is a command-line tool designed to improve the developer experience when working with feature flags by providing utilities for code generation and flag validation.

results.title: OpenGlobus
results.description: OpenGlobus is an open-source, free TypeScript/JavaScript library that uses WebGL to display interactive 3D maps and geospatial data, supporting terrain providers, imagery layers, and 3D object rendering.

results.title: OpenFL
results.description: OpenFL is an open-source project that allows game and application developers to deliver creative masterpieces using the Haxe programming language across widely different platforms with a single codebase.

results.title: OpenGlobus
results.description: OpenGlobus is an open-source TypeScript/JavaScript library using WebGL to display interactive 3D maps and geospatial data, supporting terrain, imagery, 3D objects, and measurement tools.

results.title: OWSLib
results.description: OWSLib is a Python package for client programming with Open Geospatial Consortium (OGC) web service interface standards, providing a common API for accessing service metadata and wrappers for numerous OGC Web Service interfaces.

results.title: OpenIdConnectClient for iOS
results.description: A lightweight library for integrating OpenID Connect into iOS projects, built with Kotlin Multiplatform and published as a Swift Package, supporting Authorization Code Grant Flow, PKCE, and JWT parsing.

results.title: OpenTK
results.description: The Open Toolkit library is a fast, low-level C# wrapper for OpenGL, OpenAL & OpenCL. It also includes windowing, mouse, keyboard and joystick input and a robust and fast math library, giving you everything you need to write your own renderer or game engine. OpenTK can be used standalone or inside a GUI on Windows, Linux, Mac.

results.title: OpenVoice
results.description: OpenVoice is a versatile instant voice cloning technology that accurately clones tone color, offers flexible voice style control, and supports zero-shot cross-lingual voice cloning, with V2 offering improved audio quality and native multi-lingual support.

results.title: OpenCut
results.description: OpenCut is a free, open-source video editor for web, desktop, and mobile that focuses on privacy, free features, and ease of use.

results.title: OpenCV
results.description: OpenCV provides Rust bindings for the OpenCV computer vision library, enabling Rust developers to utilize its extensive functionalities for image processing, computer vision, and machine learning.

results.title: Opctl
results.description: Opctl is an open-source, cross-platform, CLI tool for orchestrating operations, enabling users to define, share, and run workflows.

results.title: Open Lovable
results.description: Chat with AI to instantly build React apps, an example application by the Firecrawl team.
